advantages: Preserves vector text (sharp at any zoom)
Hierarchical StructTreeRoot (Document > Sect > H1 / Table > TR > TD) matching tag-builder output
Bidi reverse-containment fallback for Arabic/Hebrew RTL content
limitations: XObject Form content streams not descended into (streamOrigin is always 'page')
/Alt and /ActualText attributes not auto-generated (Figure elements lack alt text)
Legacy Distiller 5.x PDFs with non-ASCII text and no ToUnicode CMaps decode poorly in the semantic extractor (PDF.js bypass)
Falls back to raster on unmatched pages
